title: Diamond Plant
description: This mod adds a diamond plant!
body:
The Diamond Plant is a special crop that grows through 3 unique stages.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Each stage brings the plant closer to maturity — after about 16 minutes and 38 seconds, it reaches full growth.

</details>



Once fully grown, it can drop up to one Diamond and a single seed, allowing you to replant it and continue your diamond farm.
However, since it only produces one seed per harvest, you’ll need to manage your farm carefully if you want to expand it!

The mod adds a balanced, survival-friendly way to grow diamonds without making the game too easy.
